claim_bullets.bullet_text: Magic may not grant unlimited power, and monsters may not all be equally strong or frightening. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7)
A character sheet may be used to track a player’s character within the fictional world. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7)
An RPG may be played by several people, with only one game master and the rest as players. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7)
Even in real life, a fight’s outcome may only be known by actually engaging. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7)
A role-playing game may progress by having participants act out roles, while the game master facilitates the scenario. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7)

source_record_text: The front matter introduces Sword World RPG, defines RPG basics, explains the rulebook’s role, and outlines the book’s structure.
